user_story: As a user I can log in or create an account with email + password, with live form validation.
expected_behaviour: Segmented Log in/Sign up toggle. Live email regex; sign-up needs 8+ chars + uppercase + special + match (checklist); login accepts 6+. Submit disabled until valid; shows 'Please wait...' while submitting; auth failure -> error toast; success -> AppGate routes.
notes: Login min-length (6) differs from sign-up (8) by design.

user_story: As a user who forgot my password I can request a reset link without leaking whether the account exists.
expected_behaviour: Email validated; submit disabled while loading (spinner). Success -> 'Check your email' confirmation (same copy regardless of account existence), button becomes RESEND LINK. Error -> generic toast.

user_story: As a user with a reset link I can set a new password and be routed correctly.
expected_behaviour: Handles PKCE (?code) and token-hash (?token_hash+type=recovery) flows; 'Verifying...' spinner; invalid link -> toast + reroute to forgot-password. New password 8+ and match; success routes to tabs or onboarding by hasCompletedOnboarding.

user_story: As a user I can sign in with Google (and Apple on iOS).
expected_behaviour: Google + Apple buttons below divider; Apple iOS-only; official Google G SVG scaled by moderateScale. Failure -> toast.

user_story: As the app I track the Supabase session/user and provide sign-out.
expected_behaviour: setSession updates session+user; setLoading gates routing; signOut clears session + resets lessons cache but preserves device prefs; cross-account leak prevented by resetForUser on user switch.

user_story: As a new user I see why to learn Kannada and start onboarding.
expected_behaviour: Brand gradient + glyph watermark; 3 motivation cards; bottom sheet with progress dots (0/5) + 'Get Started' -> /onboarding/name.

user_story: As a user I enter my name and the app stores it and sets spoken mode.
expected_behaviour: Step 1 of 4; input trimmed, 1-30 chars; Continue disabled until valid; seeded from store on back-nav; setDisplayName + setLearningMode('spoken') -> /motivation.

user_story: As a user I pick up to 3 motivations or write my own.
expected_behaviour: Step 2 of 4; 8 preset cards toggle (max 3); 'Other' expands a 60-char input counting as 1; Continue disabled until >=1; seeded on back-nav.

user_story: As a user I set my daily goal (5/10/20 min) with an info explainer.
expected_behaviour: Step 3 of 4; 3 cards; info icon -> LearningTimeInfoDialog; Continue disabled until selected; seeded on back-nav.

user_story: As a user I view the basics guide and finish onboarding, progressing even if server sync fails.
expected_behaviour: Renders GuideFlow; Continue -> finishOnboarding(); validates fields (reroutes if missing); completeOnboarding API -> hydrate + route to tabs; on error queue pendingOnboardingSync and still route to tabs.

user_story: As the router I present onboarding as a slide stack with no header.
expected_behaviour: Stack with slide_from_right, headerShown false.

user_story: As a user I switch between Home, Learn, Practice, Profile via a floating pill.
expected_behaviour: Floating pill above safe area; active tab = red circle; inactive = grey icon; content padded by TAB_BAR_CLEARANCE+inset; tapping active is no-op; a11y selected state.

user_story: As a user I see the wordmark and my streak at the top of tab screens.
expected_behaviour: English+Kannada wordmark left; StreakPill right; hairline border; safe-area insets.

user_story: As a user I tap my streak to open streak details.
expected_behaviour: Gold pill, flame + count; tap wiggles flame ~270ms then onPress; a11y 'Current streak: X days'.

user_story: As a user I see animated single/triple progress rings for my goals.
expected_behaviour: Single ring animates sweep on mount; MultiProgressRing nests Listen(red)/Speak(gold)/Practice(blue) each with own track + animated head cap.

user_story: As a user I land on a dashboard greeting me by name with my day's progress.
expected_behaviour: Greeting 'Namaskara, {firstName}'; loading -> HomeSkeleton; error -> ErrorState/OfflineState; renders rings, continue, words, emergency cards.

user_story: As a user I see Listen/Speak/Practice progress toward today's targets.
expected_behaviour: 3 concentric rings show X/target per channel; data from real per-day activity, resets at date rollover.

user_story: As a user I can resume my next lesson from home.
expected_behaviour: Shows next lesson (skips empty-content lessons) -> /lesson/{slug}; if all done shows 'All caught up'.

user_story: As a user I see how many words I've learned this week and can list them.
expected_behaviour: Gold banner: count + % of weekly target + red progress bar; 'See all' -> WordsLearnedSheet grouped by lesson with audio.

user_story: As a user I can jump to offline survival phrases and get a one-time nudge to the basics guide.
expected_behaviour: 'Stuck right now?' card -> /emergency (offline). One-time nudge toast when userHydrated + hasSeenBasicsGuide + !hasSeenBasicsHomeNudge.

user_story: As a user I see all lessons in order with done/active/locked states.
expected_behaviour: Loading -> LearnSkeleton; error -> ErrorState/OfflineState. Done=grey+check (replayable); Active=red+play (+part progress bar if multi-part); Locked=dim+lock tile.

user_story: As a user I can open the Kannada basics primer from Learn.
expected_behaviour: Basics card opens guide/info; tied to hasSeenBasicsGuide nudge.

user_story: As a user I can tap a lesson to see its info or why it's locked.
expected_behaviour: Active/Done -> LessonInfoDialog (number, title, desc, phrase count, minutes); Locked -> LessonLockedDialog with 'Go to previous'.

user_story: As a user I see games that unlock as I complete lessons.
expected_behaviour: Featured Quick Quiz (tall gold); grid Dictation+Conversations; wide Opposites. Each locked until enough learned -> faded + lock badge, no play orb; unlocked -> play orb.

user_story: As a new user with no progress I see a prompt to start learning.
expected_behaviour: GamesLockedEmpty: orange well, 'Games unlock as you learn', 'Start Lesson 1' button.

user_story: As a user I see my name, join date, overall progress and stat cards.
expected_behaviour: Loading -> ProfileSkeleton; empty (no progress) -> NoStreakEmpty. Overall % gold banner + bar; stat cards lessons-done + words-learned; version footer.

user_story: As a user I can view my learning goal details.
expected_behaviour: Goal card subtitle '{min}/day - {n} reasons'; tap -> GoalSummarySheet with mode, target, motivations.

user_story: As a user I can reach reminders/audio/help and sign out.
expected_behaviour: Rows: Reminders -> RemindersSheet; Audio -> /settings/audio; Help -> /settings/help. Sign out -> SignOutDialog -> signOut + 'Signed out' toast.

user_story: As a user I can set TTS speed, toggle auto-replay, and open device voice settings.
expected_behaviour: Speed buttons (0.75/1.0/1.25/1.5x), 'Try it' plays sample (fail -> toast); auto-replay toggle persists via API (revert+toast on fail); 'Open device TTS settings' -> Linking.openSettings.

user_story: As a user I can reach feedback and (if configured) contact/report.
expected_behaviour: Send feedback -> /settings/feedback. Contact/Report rows hidden when SUPPORT_EMAIL null.
notes: SUPPORT_EMAIL intentionally null until owner fills.

user_story: As a user I can submit feedback (<=1000 chars).
expected_behaviour: Multiline input + char counter; Send disabled until trimmed>0; submit -> 'Please wait...'; success toast + route back; error -> toast + re-enable.

user_story: As a learner I move through a lesson's phases at my own pace.
expected_behaviour: Loading spinner (back chip stays); error card w/ retry+help; not-found fallback. Flow: situation -> per section [teach words -> practice words -> teach phrases -> practice phrases] -> summary -> real world -> done. Back steps one phase; clamped; done terminal. Split lesson w/o part -> part chooser.

user_story: As a learner I read the lesson context and register note before starting.
expected_behaviour: Gold context card + title + description; optional registerNote box; 'Let''s start' -> teach_words.

user_story: As a learner I hear and read each word before practising.
expected_behaviour: Auto-play if autoReplay; transliteration/gloss/optional tag/faint Kannada; AudioOrb replay (records listen); audio fail -> toast w/ retry; progress 'Word N of M'; last word CTA changes.

user_story: As a learner I hear a word and pick its meaning from 3 options.
expected_behaviour: Auto-play; AudioOrb+SpeedControl; 3 shuffled options (2 distinct distractors); correct bounces gold+check, wrong shakes red+'Try again', reveals translit/script; pick locks; Next enabled after pick.

user_story: As a learner I see the word and confirm I said it aloud.
expected_behaviour: Shows translit/gloss/Kannada + gold AudioOrb; 'I said it' records speak metric + advances; honor system (no recognition).

user_story: As a learner I hear a phrase and tap individual words to hear them.
expected_behaviour: Translit split into tappable chips matched to vocab (normalize strips punct/case); chip tap highlights 600ms + plays; full-phrase AudioOrb; auto-play if autoReplay; records listen; unmatched chip disabled.
fix_status: Partial: ISS-18 Done; ISS-09 Open (needs content check)

user_story: As a learner I hear a phrase and pick its meaning.
expected_behaviour: Same as LES-04 for phrases; reveals translit+Kannada after correct; up to 2 distractors.

user_story: As a learner I confirm I said the phrase aloud.
expected_behaviour: English box + translit/Kannada card + AudioOrb; 'I said it' records speak metric.

user_story: As a learner I review all words/phrases I just learned.
expected_behaviour: Words + Phrases sections; each row translit/Kannada/English + AudioOrb; respects part boundaries.

user_story: As a learner I get a real-world challenge prompt before finishing.
expected_behaviour: Gold prompt card; 'I''ll try this' + 'Skip for now' both advance to done.
notes: Both CTAs do the same thing.

user_story: As a learner I see my progress and continue to next lesson or games.
expected_behaviour: Trail viz (prev/current/next or trophy); completion mutation fires on mount; nav CTAs wait for save, retry on fail; LessonNotRegisteredError -> toast; 'Practice games' + 'Home'.

user_story: As a learner I see a sub-part is done and what's next.
expected_behaviour: Gold check, '{part} done!', 'Up next', 'Continue to {next}' + 'Back to parts'; no server save here.

user_story: As a learner I pick an unlocked part of a split lesson.
expected_behaviour: Title + 'N of M parts done' + optional situation; rows done/active/locked; tap unlocked -> /lesson/{slug}?part={key}; locked disabled.

user_story: As a learner I pick an unlocked lesson to play a game with.
expected_behaviour: Header back+title; staggered pills; unlocked gold w/ glyph+chevron, locked flat w/ lock tile; footer hint; tap unlocked -> game runner.

user_story: As a learner I see how far through the lesson I am.
expected_behaviour: Label 'Word N of M - LISTEN/SAY' + filled gold bar; clamps 0-1; total=0 -> 0%.

user_story: As a learner I get animated right/wrong feedback on options.
expected_behaviour: White chunky card; correct -> gold bg+border+check+bounce spring; wrong -> pale red+red border+shake; disabled after reveal.

user_story: As a learner I see a 'Correct'/'Try again' tag.
expected_behaviour: Correct = green icon + 'Correct'; wrong = red icon + 'Try again'.

user_story: As a learner I cycle audio speed during a lesson and it persists.
expected_behaviour: Gold pill labelled Slow/Normal/Fast/Very fast; tap cycles + calls onRateChange; persists to userStore.ttsRate.

user_story: As a learner I step back one phase (distinct from exiting).
expected_behaviour: Floating chunky circle right of ExitBackButton; calls goPrevious; not rendered when canGoPrevious false; hitSlop 12.

user_story: As a logged-out user I'm redirected to login before any game.
expected_behaviour: Waits while authLoading (renders null); no session -> Redirect to login; else Stack no header.

user_story: As a learner I pick a lesson for a chosen game.
expected_behaviour: Invalid game -> 'Game not found' + Back to Practice; valid -> LessonSelector; pick -> /{game}/{n}; back -> /practice.

user_story: As a learner I play a specific game on a specific lesson.
expected_behaviour: Validates game key + lesson 1-8 + optional part; image-match treated as not-found; switch -> Opposite/Dictation/QuickQuiz/Conversation; else 'Game not found'.

user_story: As a learner I pick an unlocked part of a split game lesson.
expected_behaviour: Title + 'N of M parts done'; rows done(gold)/active(blue+play)/locked(disabled+lock); tap unlocked -> ?part={key}; ExitBackButton.

user_story: As a learner I play a game, get per-question feedback, and see my final score.
expected_behaviour: Loading/error/empty states; ProgressBar + score + streak; option grid w/ correct/wrong feedback + haptics; result screen w/ Replay + back; completeGamePart on result; recordAttempt fire-and-forget.

user_story: As the app I define the available games and validate game keys.
expected_behaviour: GAMES list (quiz/dictation/conversations/opposites/image-match) + isGameKey validator.

user_story: As a new learner I step through a 3-step Kannada basics guide.
expected_behaviour: Fetch guide from DB (fallback constants/guide.ts) on mount; GuideLoading while fetching; 3 steps Things/Vowels/Reading; step1 back -> exit; final CTA -> finish.

user_story: As a learner I see my progress through the 3-step guide.
expected_behaviour: Back chip + 'Kannada basics' + 'step/3' + gold progress bar; scroll body; red CTA label per step; CTA can disable during onboarding sync.

user_story: As a learner I learn three foundational rules with audio demos.
expected_behaviour: Heading + DB intro; 3 habit cards; habit 1 text-only, habits 2-3 have phoneme demo buttons.

user_story: As a learner I hear vowel pairs and loner vowels.
expected_behaviour: Vowel pair rows (short/long + AudioOrb + chevron); loner row; one orb plays at a time; audio fail -> toast w/ retry.

user_story: As a learner I learn the capital/curled pattern and try a word.
expected_behaviour: Fixed Ta/ta + Da/da comparisons w/ insight text; gold TRY IT card w/ DB word + AudioOrb; audio fail -> toast.

user_story: As a learner I tap a glyph to hear a phoneme.
expected_behaviour: Chunky card; glyph + romanization + optional note + AudioOrb; red or gold accent variant; mounted-guard playback.

user_story: As a learner I see the guide loading and can go back.
expected_behaviour: Watermark + back chip + BrandSpinner; no timeout/error path.

user_story: As a learner I read about Karnataka heritage linked from lessons.
expected_behaviour: Unknown id -> 'Heritage entry not found' + back; else back chip + image placeholder + eyebrow/title/subtitle + scrollable body. Only 'hampi' exists.

user_story: As a user in a tough spot I find and hear urgent Kannada phrases offline.
expected_behaviour: Loading spinner; error card + retry; red gradient header 'works offline'; category chips; context bar; urgency-sorted cards (regex-ranked) w/ badge+English+translit+Kannada+AudioOrb; TTS playback.

files: components/modals/ModalHost.tsx, Dialog.tsx, BottomSheet.tsx, Takeover.tsx, Backdrop.tsx, Halo.tsx
user_story: As a user I get focused overlays (dialog/sheet/takeover) dismissible by backdrop/swipe/back.
expected_behaviour: Single-slot host (new modal dismisses prior); Dialog fade+spring (reduce-motion aware), destructive blocks backdrop; BottomSheet @gorhom swipe+backdrop dismiss; Takeover full-screen slide; Backdrop blur+fade.

user_story: As a user I get success (top, auto 3s) and error (bottom, sticky) toasts.
expected_behaviour: Single-entry; success top pill auto-dismiss; error bottom card sticky w/ keyboard lift + retry onPress; bridge lets non-React services fire toasts; stable ids dedupe.

user_story: As a user I confirm before exiting a lesson.
expected_behaviour: Red X halo, reassurance copy, 'Exit'(red)+'Cancel'(tan); blocks backdrop/hardware back.

user_story: As a user I view my learning goal, daily target, and motivations.
expected_behaviour: Sheet shows goal label, daily target, motivations list, footer note.

user_story: As a user I learn what each time commitment unlocks.
expected_behaviour: Clock halo, 'DAILY GOAL' eyebrow, title+body per option; info-only.

user_story: As a user I see a lesson's details.
expected_behaviour: Info halo, eyebrow 'Lesson N', title, desc, stats (phrases+minutes), lock copy if locked.

user_story: As a user I learn what to complete to unlock a lesson.
expected_behaviour: Lock tile, explanation, 'Got it' + 'Back to lessons' (navigates away); lighter backdrop.

user_story: As a user I see why a permission is needed before the OS asks.
expected_behaviour: Bell/mic halo, title+body, preview card, 'Allow X' + 'Not now'.

user_story: As a user I see a phrase breakdown with audio.
expected_behaviour: Translit+English+Kannada+play orb; 'Break it down' gloss atoms; optional note; 'Got it'; TTS play, fail -> toast w/ retry.

user_story: As a user I enable a daily reminder and pick a time.
expected_behaviour: Toggle + prominent time card -> native picker; quick-pick chips; on enable checks permission (deny -> PermissionDialog), persists via API, schedules OS reminder, toast.

user_story: As a user I confirm sign-out and am reassured data is saved.
expected_behaviour: Title + reassurance, 'Sign out'(red) + 'Stay signed in'(tan).

user_story: As a user I see my week, milestone progress, and quick actions.
expected_behaviour: Flame medallion + count; week day-dots (done/today/future); milestone nudge; 'Set a reminder' + 'Keep learning' (-> next uncompleted lesson).
notes: next-lesson may be stale after completion.

user_story: As a user I get a full-screen celebration at streak milestones.
expected_behaviour: Confetti + medallion + milestone copy (3/7/12/30/60/100/365); 'Keep going' + optional 'Share'.

user_story: As a user with no Kannada voice I get a one-time setup guide.
expected_behaviour: Headphones halo, settings-path box, 'Open settings' + 'Maybe later'; both set hasSeenTtsWarning.

user_story: As a user I browse all learned words grouped by lesson with audio.
expected_behaviour: Back + title + count; grouped sections; rows translit/Kannada/English + audio; tap plays TTS, fail -> toast.

user_story: As a user I see a branded splash while the app boots.
expected_behaviour: Red radial + watermark; icon tile scale-in; wordmark/subtitle rise (staggered); gold loader + tagline; reduce-motion -> static fade.

user_story: As a user I see a spinner while content loads, without being trapped.
expected_behaviour: Red ring 0.9s/turn (always spins); LoadingScreen cream bg + spinner + label + optional back chip.

user_story: As a user I see a recoverable error with retry.
expected_behaviour: Red well + alert icon, title+body, 'Try again' + optional 'Get help'.

user_story: As a user offline I see a cautionary screen, not an error.
expected_behaviour: Orange wifi-off well, 'Try again' + optional 'Practice offline'; shared SystemStateScreen scaffold w/ staggered rise.

user_story: As a user I see helpful empty states per tab.
expected_behaviour: GamesLockedEmpty + NoStreakEmpty: watermark + TopBar + hero well + title + body + single CTA.

user_story: As a user I see layout-matching skeletons while tabs load.
expected_behaviour: Shimmer blocks (gradient sweep 1.5s, reduce-motion static); per-tab skeletons mirror final layout; opacity falloff hints more content.

user_story: As the system I track streak, completions, XP, and daily activity, surviving reinstalls.
expected_behaviour: Idempotent completeLesson; XP 20 if score>=80 else 10; streak +1 if lastActive=yesterday else reset 1; daily listen/speak/practice rolls at midnight; server hydration adopts fresher values; AsyncStorage + legacy-key migration.

user_story: As the system I persist per-user onboarding/prefs and per-device flags.
expected_behaviour: Per-user fields wiped on resetForUser; per-device (mode/warnings/denials) survive; monotonic onboarding flag; hydrateFromUserRow DB-first.

user_story: As a user I hear Kannada audio (bundled clip first, else device TTS) at my chosen speed.
expected_behaviour: play() tries bundled clip then Speech.speak; stops prior playback; applies ttsRate 0.5-1.5; pitch correction on clips; recording (mic permission) + playback; isKannadaVoiceAvailable cached probe.

user_story: As a user I boot into the right place (auth/onboarding/tabs) with crash safety.
expected_behaviour: ErrorBoundary+Sentry; fonts; TtsProbe one-time warning; AppGate subscribes to auth, hydrates stores, retries onboarding sync, re-arms reminders, backfills completions; routing gates on auth/hydration/onboarding.
